creator: p.mousavizadeh@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 241236
patch

Hi,

4.0.2 Changes:
Fixes setting editor's height whenever the HTML preview is updated, ignoring the MARKDOWNX_EDITOR_RESIZABLE option

Here is the changelog:
https://github.com/neutronX/django-markdownx/releases/tag/v4.0.2

Portlint: looks fine.
Portclippy: looks fine.

I tested the new upgrade by using the sample in the tutorial below.
https://blog.devgenius.io/django-markdown-part-2-installing-an-editor-ff32aadc49d2
and it works.

USES replaces with 3.6+ as is minimum requirements in:
https://github.com/neutronX/django-markdownx
